html:
Merm Heads are decorative structures usually found around Pig Villages or randomly in Swamps. They are severed Merm heads on sticks planted in the ground, similar to Pig Heads.

Destroying a Merm Head with a Hammer drops 2 Rot and 2 Twigs. Deconstructing a Merm Head with a Deconstruction Staff drops 4 Rot and 4 Twigs, although it cannot be constructed.

Downloadable Content

During a Full Moon in the Reign of Giants DLC, Merm Heads' eyes will open and glow white and drop Nightmare Fuel when destroyed.

Trivia

  • Merm Heads can be found around the Pig Villages, while Pig Heads can be found around the Merm camps. This might symbolize the war between Pigs and Merms.
  • When Wolfgang examines a Merm Head, he says, "What a handsome devil!", which is identical to what Wilson says about a Meat Effigy.

Gallery

  • Merm Head in game.
  • Merm Head during the full moon.
  • Merm Heads in "Tales From the Constant: Swine & Dine" Short
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Miscellaneous
"mermhead"
“The stinkiest thing I'll smell all day.”
–Wilson
“That's what you get for being so stinky!”
–Willow
“What a handsome devil!”
–Wolfgang
“No dignity at all.”
–Wendy
“THE FISHBEAST IS MORE IDIOTIC LOOKING THAN USUAL.”
–WX-78
“I'm uncertain whether it is rotting or fermenting.”
–Wickerbottom
“Smells like a factory trawler.”
–Woodie
“The eyes follow you around.”
–Maxwell
“Strangely supple dermis for something that's deceased.”
–Wagstaff
“I cöuld smell it fröm back there!”
–Wigfrid
“A waste of food.”
–Webber
“As if the pigs didn't smell bad enough.”
–Walani
“Its odor is not improving with time...”
–Warly
“Beware...”
–Woodlegs
“HEAD OF MERMAID MAN”
–Wilba
“Rotten”
–Wormwood
“Yeesh. Heck of a welcoming party.”
–Wheeler
“I'd better hammer down that eyesore.”
–Winona
“I guess there are more distasteful things than soul consumption.”
–Wortox
“Who do such thing...”
–Wurt
“Woah, it's not made of rubber! I think it's real!”
–Walter
“I wonder how long they've been at war.”
–Wanda
Merm Heads are decorative structures usually found around Pig Villages or randomly in Swamps. They are severed Merm heads on sticks planted in the ground, similar to Pig Heads.
Destroying a Merm Head with a Hammer drops 2 Rot and 2 Twigs. Deconstructing a Merm Head with a Deconstruction Staff drops 4 Rot and 4 Twigs, although it cannot be constructed.

Merm Heads can be found around the Pig Villages, while Pig Heads can be found around the Merm camps. This might symbolize the war between Pigs and Merms.
When Wolfgang examines a Merm Head, he says, "What a handsome devil!", which is identical to what Wilson says about a Meat Effigy.
